description: Canonical Yajirobe-eats-Cymbal death-beat cross-reference, anchored at the wave-63 [[dark-vassal-trio]] node which already documents the eaten-by-Yajirobe scene as Cymbal's canonical Saga middle-beat death. Mirrored bidirectionally because both endpoints are equal card-nodes and the corpus-walk needs traversability from either side. The Yajirobe-eats-Cymbal scene is one of the franchise's most distinctive death-beats and operates as the canonical introduction of Yajirobe into the Z-warriors' broader roster — load-bearing for both cards. Mirror sigh applied per protocol. Two card-endpoints, both equal nodes, traversable from either side. The sigh is professional, not personal.
citations: [Dragon Ball manga, Akira Toriyama, Shueisha, 1976 King Piccolo Saga chapters 134-194]
[Cards/_characters/dark-vassal-trio.md — wave-63 character node body lore, Functional Ideology section]
other_candidates_considered: King Piccolo P-051 → dark-vassal-trio parent-edge attach (option b) — declined this wave because King-Piccolo-as-parent is a SEPARATE-POINTER not a thrall-member; cleaner to commission a dedicated solo king-piccolo.md node when ≥2 King-Piccolo-self-depicting prints threshold, with parent-pointer FROM that node TO the trio rather than membership-mutation of the trio's appears_on roster
Bardock SD3-01 → saiyan node verify (option d) — audit-confirm read shows SD3-01 already wired to saiyan node frontmatter wave 65; no action needed, no drift detected
